info4: I'm Minako. It's a pleasure to be of service.

info4: Please excuse the interruption. As the Seer it is my duty to report. Takumi is the Werewolf.

info4: I am a seer. I divined Mizuki and Mizuki was a human.

info4: I divined Takumi last night and found out he is human.

info4: Three Seer claims on day one? The plot certainly thickens faster than tea. This should be an entertaining puzzle. @Minako  your claim directly conflicts with both Rin and Mizuki. Care to explain how you see the night unfolding?

info4: So we've lost Minako and Rin leaving us with two confirmed Seer claims down. Mizuki doubling back is quite an artful twist. @Takumi  your concerns mirror my own. It is rather inconsistent for Mizuki to reverse her position so abruptly isn't it?
